text: Search the web for the latest AI agent frameworks released in 2026
web.search(query='AI agent frameworks 2026 Python')
results: [{"title": "Top AI Agent Frameworks 2026", "url": "https://example.com/ai-frameworks", "snippet": "A roundup of the most popular agent orchestration libraries..."}]
Found relevant results on AI agent frameworks. Want me to summarize the top page?
Summarize the top result
web.summarize(url='https://example.com/ai-frameworks')

summary: The article covers 8 agent frameworks: LangGraph, CrewAI, AutoGen, contextweaver, Agno, Phidata, Smolagents, and PydanticAI. Key differentiators: contextweaver focuses on token budget management and routing; LangGraph on stateful graphs; AutoGen on multi-agent coordination.
Summary ready. contextweaver is highlighted for token budget management and routing capabilities.
Index this article in our search catalog
documents.index(url='https://example.com/ai-frameworks', namespace='research', tags=['ai', 'frameworks', '2026'])

status: ok
doc_id: DOC-2026-0891
namespace: research
indexed_at: 2026-04-15T15:00:00Z
Article indexed as DOC-2026-0891 in the research namespace.
Search our internal knowledge base for anything on token budget management
internal.search(query='token budget management context window', namespace='research')
Found 2 relevant internal documents on token budget management.
Query documents by the AI tag to see what else is in the research namespace
documents.query(namespace='research', tags=['ai'], limit=10)

documents: [{"doc_id": "DOC-2026-0712", "title": "Survey of LLM Tool Use Patterns"}, {"doc_id": "DOC-2026-0891", "title": "Top AI Agent Frameworks 2026"}]
count: 2
2 AI-tagged documents in research namespace.
Get search suggestions for 'context window optim'
internal.suggest(prefix='context window optim', namespace='research')
suggestions: ['context window optimization', 'context window overflow', 'context window budget']
3 suggestions returned for 'context window optim'.
Create a doc page summarizing what we found about agent frameworks
pages.create(title='AI Agent Frameworks — 2026 Survey', namespace='research', content='Survey of 8 leading frameworks. contextweaver, LangGraph, AutoGen highlighted.')

status: ok
page_id: PAGE-2026-0441
title: AI Agent Frameworks — 2026 Survey
created_at: 2026-04-15T15:05:00Z
Created doc page PAGE-2026-0441 in research namespace.
Create a user account for the new research intern who will be using this catalog
users.create(name='Alex Kim', email='alex.kim@company.com', role='researcher')

status: ok
user_id: USR-2026-0441
name: Alex Kim
email: alex.kim@company.com
role: researcher
created_at: 2026-04-15T15:06:00Z
User account created for Alex Kim (USR-2026-0441) with researcher role.
Assign the research namespace read role to Alex
roles.assign(user_id='USR-2026-0441', role='namespace_reader', scope='research')

status: ok
assignment_id: ROLE-2026-0901
user_id: USR-2026-0441
role: namespace_reader
scope: research
Research namespace read role assigned to Alex Kim.
Track an analytics event for this research session
events.track(event='research_session', user_id='USR-2026-0441', properties={"topic": "ai_agent_frameworks", "docs_created": 1, "docs_indexed": 1})

status: ok
event_id: EVT-2026-1122
tracked_at: 2026-04-15T15:07:00Z
Analytics event tracked for this research session (EVT-2026-1122).
Publish the new page so external contributors can see it
pages.publish(page_id='PAGE-2026-0441')

status: ok
page_id: PAGE-2026-0441
published_at: 2026-04-15T15:08:00Z
visibility: public
Page PAGE-2026-0441 published and publicly visible.
Rotate the API key secret used by the research catalog service
secrets.rotate(secret_name='research-catalog-api-key')

status: ok
secret_name: research-catalog-api-key
rotated_at: 2026-04-15T15:09:00Z
next_rotation: 2026-07-15T15:09:00Z
API key rotated successfully. Next rotation scheduled for July 15.
Create a new deployment for the updated research catalog service
deployments.create(service='research-catalog', version='v1.4.0', environment='production', strategy='rolling')

status: ok
deployment_id: DEPLOY-2026-0881
service: research-catalog
version: v1.4.0
status: in_progress
started_at: 2026-04-15T15:10:00Z
Deployment DEPLOY-2026-0881 started for research-catalog v1.4.0 (rolling strategy).
Reindex the research search namespace after the deployment
internal.reindex(namespace='research')

status: ok
documents_reindexed: 2
namespace: research
duration_ms: 214
completed_at: 2026-04-15T15:11:00Z
Research namespace reindexed: 2 documents updated in 214ms.
Query the analytics dashboard for research activity this month
dashboards.list(namespace='research', period='2026-04')
dashboards: [{"id": "DASH-2026-0041", "title": "Research Activity April 2026", "views": 12, "updated": "2026-04-15"}]
